sentences.arabic: سَافَرْتُ مَعَ مَجْمُوعَةٍ مِنَ الأَصْدِقَاءِ لِأَوَّلِ مَرَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Putovao sam s grupom prijatelja prvi put.
sentences.translationEn: I travelled with a group of friends for the first time.

sentences.arabic: كُنَّا عَشَرَةَ أَشْخَاصٍ وَكُلُّ وَاحِدٍ مَسْؤُولٌ عَنْ شَيْءٍ.
sentences.translation: Nas je bilo desetoro i svako je bio odgovoran za nešto.
sentences.translationEn: There were ten of us and each person was responsible for something.

sentences.arabic: تَشَارَكْنَا تَكَالِيفَ الرِّحْلَةِ وَوَفَّرْنَا الْكَثِيرَ مِنَ الْمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Dijelili smo troškove putovanja i uštedjeli smo puno novca.
sentences.translationEn: We shared the trip costs and saved a lot of money.

sentences.arabic: ضَحِكْنَا كَثِيرًا وَاسْتَمْتَعْنَا بِكُلِّ لَحْظَةٍ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Mnogo smo se smijali i uživali u svakom trenutku zajedno.
sentences.translationEn: We laughed a lot and enjoyed every moment together.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرْنَا أَنْ نُكَرِّرَ التَّجْرِبَةَ فِي الْعَامِ الْقَادِمِ.
sentences.translation: Odlučili smo ponoviti iskustvo sljedeće godine.
sentences.translationEn: We decided to repeat the experience next year.
